# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "threeTierVNet"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the virtual network
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.0.0/16"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the virtual network
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.1.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the web subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.2.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the app subnet
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.3.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the database subnet

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
    subnets:
      - name: "webSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'webNSG')]"
      - name: "appSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'appNSG')]"
      - name: "dbSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'dbNSG')]"

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "webNSG"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowHTTP"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "80"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: Allow
          direction: Inbound
      - name: "AllowHTTPS"
        properties:
          priority: 110
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "443"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: Allow
          direction: Inbound
      - name: "AllowRDP"
        properties:
          priority: 120
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "3389"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: Allow
          direction: Inbound

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "appNSG"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowAppToWeb"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "80"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
          access: Allow
          direction: Outbound
      - name: "AllowAppToDB"
        properties:
          priority: 110
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "1433"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
          access: Allow
          direction: Outbound

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "dbNSG"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowAppToDB"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: Tcp
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "1433"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: Allow
          direction: Inbound
